title: OKR Progress Health Check
shortDescription: Assess in-flight OKR progress with on-track/at-risk/off-track scoring, confidence levels, and escalation recommendations.

inputs.label: OKRs with Current Progress
inputs.example: O1: Increase activation rate | KR1: 30-day activation, target: 55%, current: 47% | KR2: Onboarding drop-off, target: -20%, current: -12% | KR3: Launch guided setup flow, target: shipped, current: 70% complete

inputs.label: Known Blockers or Risks
inputs.example: Design resource pulled to another project for 2 weeks. Analytics tracking for KR1 has a data gap in mobile app.

inputs.label: Business Context
inputs.example: Board review in 3 weeks. Q2 planning starts next month. Team headcount increased by 1 mid-quarter.
